description: Code child: gather context, implement changes, find downstream impacts, run quality gates, return structured result

steps.title: Gather context
steps.description: Query codebase-retrieval for exact signatures, usage patterns, and caller relationships for subtask {{subtask_index}} of {{subtask_count}} in task {{task_id}}. Read assigned files. Verify external APIs via Context7 if needed. Apply interface appendix identifiers exactly as cited. Hard gate: must call codebase-retrieval at least once.

steps.title: Implement changes
steps.description: Make targeted, minimal edits for subtask {{subtask_index}} of {{subtask_count}}: use edit_file/apply_diff for modifications, write_to_file only for new files. Stay within assigned scope and files.

steps.title: Find and update downstream impacts
steps.description: Search for all references to modified functions, classes, and types. Update call sites, imports, and tests affected by changes in subtask {{subtask_index}}.

steps.title: Run quality gates
steps.description: Run composite quality gate for subtask {{subtask_index}}: ruff format, ruff check, mypy, pytest. All 4 must pass via bounded_gate.py with receipt tracking. Fix and re-run if any gate fails.

steps.title: Return subtask result
steps.description: Return structured result for subtask {{subtask_index}} of {{subtask_count}} in task {{task_id}}: status (SUCCESS/ERROR/PARTIAL), deliverables, success criteria verification, quality gate results, runtime attestation.
